meta.name: upgradeAwsCloudAccountFeaturesWithoutCft
meta.description: Updates status of AWS cloud account features to connected if they are in update permissions state. This mutation should be used with caution. This mutation does not verify if the required permissions are actually granted to the user or not. Its usage is restricted to only IAM user-based and authentication server-based AWS cloud accounts.
